programme.title: Sharks of the Coral Canyon
programme.desc: Sharks of the Coral Canyon highlights how sharks and coral reefs are intricately linked. The film features first-time-ever footage of sharks hunting at night, as well as new shark hunting behavior. Corals and sharks depend on one another, and must be protected together if either of them is to survive into the future.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep124: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Xiamen, China
programme.desc: The UIM F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour heads to a new location, Xiamen, China, for Round 5 with the Grand Prix of Xiamen.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep312: World Sail Racing Tour + Cliff Diving + Canoe Team Challenge
programme.desc: Event Highlights from the RC44 Sailing World Tour Stop in Portoroz, Slovenia + Cliff Diving's 5 Basic Dives + The Sickline Canoeing Team Challenge from Canada.

programme.title: Xplash Ep104
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. Today we'll take an airboat ride in Florida to check out alligators, wakeboard through Bangkok's floating marketplace, and begin with a stormy yacht ride in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep107: Sharks at Palau’s Blue Corner + Denver’s High-Altitude Shark Aquarium
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with an amazing array of sharks at Palau’s Blue Corner, shows how sharks adapt in Denver’s High-Altitude Aquarium and takes a Deeper Dive with Spiny Dogfish Sharks.

programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 01
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 02
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 03
programme.desc: Some of the greatest pro snowboarders to ever do it, claim Josh Dirksen as their favorite rider to watch. His Microdose story continues, taking on new dimensions with perspectives from more of his MtBachelor Bend Oregon crew: Kevin Jones, Todd Richards, Trevor Graves, Embry Rucker and Robbie Morrow

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 04
programme.desc:
Growing up snowboarding the natural wind features of Mt. Bachelor played a big part in shaping Josh Dirksen's unique and seemingly effortless riding style. He seamlessly transferred his surf and skateboard influenced smoothness to a new audience, when he started filming with Kingpin Productions.
Featuring: Gerry Lopez, Travis Yamada, Kevin Jones, Trevor Graves, Rob Morrow, Allister Schultz, Chad Otterstrom, "Whitey" Rob McConnaughey

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Down For This
programme.desc: Down For This is a rollercoaster of adrenaline and heartfelt emotion in a 1-hour-25-minute slide of 30 years past to present. Featuring some of the most memorable Volcom skating surfing and snowboarding.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 1
programme.desc: In Chapter One of Side Hits Euphoria, snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo showcase their favorite features to ride; random jumps and hits on the side of the piste. They spent their season capturing these little treasures hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 2
programme.desc: Chapter 2 of Side Hits Euphoria features resort riding, side hits, and random stuff on the slopes. In December 2018, the snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo filmed everything they found during their travels to Mount Seymour in Canada, and in Laax and Arêches-Beaufort in Switzerland.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 3
programme.desc: Side Hits Euphoria is back! Chapter 3 features resort riding, side bonking, groomer gliding, and pure shredding. Filmed by the snowboarders Olivier Gittler and Arthur Longo in December of 2019, in and around Tignes, Val d’Isère, Avoriaz and Chamonix, France. Thanks for watching!

programme.title: Creedlecosm
programme.desc: Volcom presents CreedleCosm, a snowboarding cinematic masterpiece. Starring Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picaro, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero, Jamie Lynn, Alec Majerus and Simon Bannerot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Crosspollution
programme.desc: High voltage shred flick from the Volcom Skateboarding and Snowboarding teams. Starring Benny Milam, Cody Warble, Reid Smith, Lenny Mazzotti, Jack Harold, Scott Blum, Christian Connors, CJ Collins, Axel Cruysberghs, Alec Majerus, Henry Gartland and Mike Ravelson. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Inexact Odyssey
programme.desc: ‘Inexact Odyssey’ is a film about unexpected adventure and endless opportunity. From the winding canyons of Zion National Park to the high alpine passes of Arlberg, Austria, filmmaker Seth Huot uses his Super-8 camera to capture spontaneous travels and impromptu sessions with the Volcom Snow team.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Tchin Tchin
programme.desc: In ‘Tchin Tchin’, the Pusher Bearings crew head to the South of France to do flip tricks and jump off cliffs. Featuring the skateboarding of Kilian Zehnder, Titi Gormit, Robin Fournier, Anto Lopez, Davide Holznecht, and Simon Perottet.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Fight Stars

programme.title: Chill

programme.title: Sports Woman

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Tiger Woods took control of golf between 1999 and April 2001, by winning five of the six major tournaments and adjudicating the Tiger Slam.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Cristiano Ronaldo is such an icon that even his goal celebration is emblematic.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the champions of combat sports, with the highs and lows of Tyson Fury, Nicola Adams's promising year in 2017 and the boxers of Jay Z. In UFC, meet Nate Diaz, the executioner of Conor McGregor.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are finally back to action! After months of waiting due to the Covid-19 pandemic, athletes and sports enthusiasts had the chance to return to some high-end performances and demanding racing; for the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships that took place in Ebensee - Lake Traunsee, Austria. Relieve the best moments on Kite Masters.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode we will be visiting one of the most beautiful spots in Croatia and unknown for many. From historic sites to fabulous new modern spots, Korčula is certainly one of my favorite places in the world. With crystal clear sea this sun-drenched oasis also has plenty of water sports on offer. Get splashed into action with us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of sun-drenched Sail-Ho Croatia! We are on the beautiful island of Hvar getting a little bit tipsy, but seriously the wine here is so good and so is the food. For the ultimate refreshment we have the appetizing crystal-clear sea around us, and we cannot refuse a dip in its warm waters.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter

programme.desc: In 2011, two brothers documented their murder spree in North Carolina. This is the actual assembled footage.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E07 - Bush Pilot's Birthday
programme.desc: A Bush Pilot's Birthday warrants a treat of a menu with pacific spot prawns and pasta to kick off this episode's menu followed by duck breast with celery root and for the main course there is rabbit and carrots.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E01 - Into the High Lonesome
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller sets off on The Trail with his trusty horse 7, to test his survival skills and pay homage to mountain men of the past. Saying goodbye to his family, Laramy and 7 have to battle the elements, build shelter, live off of the land, and survive a 30-day trek through the backcountry.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E06 - Flood
programme.desc: When the levee breaks, the stuff really hits the fan…. Desperate Hours looks at some of the most devastating floods in history including the flood of Rio De Janeiro in Brazil, the Louisiana floods in the United States, the Hamburg floods in Germany, the Uttarakhand floods in North India, and the Indian Ocean tsunami in Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E07 - Geological Disasters
programme.desc: Sometimes, all that it takes is a shift underfoot…. Desperate Hours looks at major geological disasters including avalanches in Afghanistan, Pakistan, Nepal, Peru, and France. It also looks at geological landslides in the Philippines, India and Columbia and an enormous sinkhole that consumed a pond in Bosnia. It also looks at Blizzards in the United States, Israel, and United Kingdom.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E08 - Nuclear Industrial
programme.desc: When humans are a serious danger to themselves ... Desperate Hours looks at nuclear and industrial disasters including the Fukushima Nuclear Power Plant disaster in Japan, the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant disaster in Ukraine, the Deepwater Oil Spill in the Gulf of Mexico, the Savar Plaza disaster in Bangladesh, and the Bhopal Gas disaster in India. When a catastrophic event strikes a nuclear power facility the resulting disaster can be, literally, off the scale and last for decades.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E09 - Disaster at Sea
programme.desc: Seafaring is a dangerous business indeed…… Desperate Hours looks at major disasters on the high seas including the Sewol Ferry disaster in South Korea, the Ferry Estonia in the Baltic Sea, the sinking of the Titanic, the Exxon Valdez in Prince William Sound Alaska, the Express Samina in Portes Islets, pirates attacking the Maersk Alabama and Seabourn Spirit, and the Costa Concordia in the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E07 - Motherly Love
programme.desc: After weeks of trying to survive in Saskatchewan, Chris and Casey have yet to kill big game. Time is running out as the bear begin to hibernate. Mental willpower is wearing thin. But a message from back home changes everything.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E08 - Refuelled
programme.desc: A turn of events lifts the brothers’ spirits, but creates a huge hurdle they must overcome as they enter a new race against the clock.Chris and Casey reflect on the challenges they have faced so far, and the challenges that still lie ahead.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E09 - The End
programme.desc: In the exciting season finale, Chris lays it all on the line one last time while bear hunting. Casey must finish one final task to make the fruits of their labor worthwhile. As the brothers inch closer to safety, they wonder what the future holds.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E10 - Reca
programme.desc: Dive deep into the season of Dropped as the brothers recap an epic 30 day adventure through the Canadian Bush.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E01 - Back In The Brooks
programme.desc: For the first time in years, the Keefer Brothers set foot on the gravel roads of remote Alaska.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E04 - Celebration
programme.desc: Another 5 Star meal from the Ewing Family. This time it is a dinner for some local natives. Bradley decides to go on a hunt for a goat for the first course of slow braised goat ragout, followed by a fish risotto, and for the main course - curried goat with apple and rose hip chutney and to complete the dinner a chocolate molten lava cake for desert.

programme.title: Afternoon
programme.desc: On 3 summer afternoons, a family meets up a beautiful house in an upscale Berlin neighborhood. They come together but ultimately drift further apart.

programme.title: MansFeld
programme.desc: A magical film about the mysteries of childhood and an old custom: In the village of MANSFELD, the ritual banishment of the old takes place every year
Marc is a surfer and lives his life one day at a time. But after many strokes of fate, he dreams of turning back time, and starting all over again.

programme.title: In Your Arms
programme.desc: The poetic tale of a man with a neurological disorder and the enigmatic nurse persuaded to support him with assisted suicide.

programme.title: One Ticket Please
programme.desc: A monument for one of New Yorks most singular theater enthusiast.

programme.title: In The Future They Ate From The Finest Porcelain
programme.desc: In a temporal twist, this movie tells the story of an intervention into the future perception of a territory’s political history.

programme.title: Solomon's Stone

programme.title: Clumsy Little Acts of Tenderness
programme.desc: The Finnish short comedy by Miia Tervo portrays an anything but typical relationship between a loving father and his skeptical daughter.

programme.title: Grimm’s Cuckoo
programme.desc: This short film dares a slightly different view of life in a psychiatric clinic. Screened at Cannes Short Film Corner and Interfilm Berlin.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: It Still Works
programme.desc: Pastor Steven showed us through the life of Moses how faith often looks like taking action even while you feel full of doubt. God can do miracles when we have the courage to look our doubt in the face and do it anyway.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis plots a mass shooting for the party. Alberto is caught up in memories of the past, including a letter where Lorenita declared her love for him. At the Oceanography Institute, Isabel surprises Malena with a bouquet of flowers as a show of 'admiration' for her new appointment. Guillermo warns Lorena of the danger her son faces for having fled the Corona household without killing Marco Aurelio.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena tries to send Alberto away, but he only seeks to break the ice and plays alluding to his childhood loves; provoking even more anger and jealousy in Guillermo, who remains threatening - Ricardo decides to hire the electrician services of María Bonita Echeverri, as a way to approach one of the four suspects with the same last name Echeverri of the theft of the check.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Lara Portillo is arranging to purchase DNA tests to prove that the young woman does not carry the blood of any of the Santa Maria's in her veins.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In front of the doctors, Pastora feigns interest in Clara Inés' condition, Clara grabs her arm forcefully, accusing her of what has happened to her.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: The young Ibáñez is very attentive to Adriana when Carlos Raúl arrives, making it clear to Santiago that Adriana will be his future wife.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana agrees to stay away from her lover while Azalea gets better; suddenly the doorbell rings and it is none other than Santiago Ibañez.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel in conflict with his children. Camila defends them and tells him that her children are afraid of him. Max is willing to meet Rosa, even at the risk of his life and Camila organizes a party to unmask Elda.

programme.title: CONECTADOS
programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes.

programme.title: Amateur
programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: ¡Ni Te Me Acerques!
programme.desc: Él solo tenía que cuidar el hotel y teclear su novela, como Jack Nicholson en “El Resplandor”, pero de buen rollo. Y Llega la cuarentena y se queda le pilla en el Hotel Balneario de Ariño haciendo frente a la paranoia general, el acoso de las fuerzas del orden, las videollamadas de su novia, su madre y del conspiranoico Javi... Todos nos aburrimos mucho en el primer confinamiento. Juan no.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
